conditions: 6 AM—Up and at 'em, Jackson. The strangely engaging season of 2026 rolls on. After yesterday's warm and windy weather, we're in for a Thursday that'll feel more "cool and calm" across the land. And, with a one-inch touchup overnight, good times galore will seem to pool in the palm of your hand. Sunflakes and snowshine will reverberate off the refurbished terrain as a few passing clouds drop long shadows on the slopes. Cooler high temperatures will top out near 20 at the summit and in the mid-to upper 30s down in the village. The winds have diminished but will still be gusting out of the west between 10 and 25 mph, especially in the upper elevations. Slashing secret stashes can lead to a rapid chain reaction of euphoric synaptic flashes. Because pow blasting is a passion that nothing surpasses, a vibe more valuable than cash is. -Lege
